{
  "relations": [
    {
      "type": "depends_on",

      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "RT appears in the equation for the collision rate related to pA."
    },
    {
      "type": "depends_on",
      "source": "pA",
      "target": "zA",
      "equation_id": "3",

      "description": "zA is derived based on the ratio of v^2 and A."
    },
    {
      "type": "depends_on",
      "source": "q",
      "target": "h",
      "equation_id": "12",
      "direction": "positive",
      "description": "The desorption rate f_des depends on q, h, and Pd."
    },
    {
      "type": "depends_on",
      "source": "g",
      "target": "dh",
      "equation_id": "16",
      "direction": "positive",
      "description": "The rate of change of h (dh/dt) is governed by g."
    },
    {
      "type": "causal",
      "source": "g",
      "target": "q",
      "equation_id": "15",
      "direction": "positive",
      "description": "g is defined as the difference between f_ads and f_des."
    },
    {
      "type": "depends_on",
      "source": "h",
      "target": "K",
      "equation_id": "13",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "K is defined in terms of h_eq, q, and pA."
    },
    {
      "type": "derived_from",
      "source": "g",
      "target": "C",
      "equation_id": "30",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "s is derived based on the relationship involving g and K across cycles."
    },
    {
      "type": "causal",
      "source": "pA",
      "target": "x",
      "equation_id": "17",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "The rate of change of pA involves both spatial and temporal derivatives."
    },
    {
      "type": "causal",
      "source": "xp",
      "target": "x",
      "equation_id": "18",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "xp is defined based on the overall diffusion process in the channel."
    },
    {
      "type": "derived_from",
      "source": "A",
      "target": "Dh",
      "equation_id": "27",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "D is given as a function of the equilibrium constant K and A."
    },
    {
      "type": "depends_on",
      "source": "M",
      "target": "q",
      "equation_id": "9",
      "direction": "positive",
      "description": "M links the quantities involved in the calculation of q."
    },
    {
      "type": "depends_on",
      "source": "h",
      "target": "t",
      "equation_id": "32",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "h is dependent on time through an integral expression involving q, pA, and Pd."
    },
    {
      "type": "depends_on",
      "source": "X",
      "target": "Z",
      "equation_id": "40",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "The relationship defines variables as part of the force calculation."
    },
    {
      "type": "causal",
      "source": "D",
      "target": "x",
      "equation_id": "24",
      "direction": "positive",
      "description": "D results from the real-time distance description in the channel."
